summary: Retweet of a Department of Labor video set to music. Desaturated sepia and black-and-white historical paintings: Founding-era figures, colonial soldiers, a gold Washington equestrian statue, sailing ships, and a young serviceman. Word-by-word animated captions read 'OUR ANCESTORS CLIMBED', 'CROSSED DESERTS', 'WIDE OPEN PLAINS', 'WHO NEVER GAVE UP', 'EVER GAVE IN'. Narration: 'crossed deserts... who never ever gave in.'

script.scene: Sepia and black-and-white painting of Founding-era figures; animated caption 'OUR ANCESTORS CLIMBED'; narration begins.
Desaturated layered montage of colonial figures and a gold statue; caption 'CROSSED DESERTS'; narration: 'crossed deserts...'
Ranks of colonial soldiers with a Revolutionary flag and a gold Washington equestrian statue; caption 'WIDE OPEN PLAINS.'
Close-up of a young serviceman looking upward over a smoky battlefield; caption 'WHO NEVER GAVE UP.'
Gold Washington-on-horseback statue against a misty harbor with a tall ship; caption 'EVER GAVE IN'; narration: 'who never ever gave in.'

notable_text: OUR ANCESTORS CLIMBED; CROSSED DESERTS; WIDE OPEN PLAINS; WHO NEVER GAVE UP; EVER GAVE IN; (tweet) One American Heritage.
